Kadir Has University in Top 5 Among Istanbul Foundation Universities in TÜMA 2025

According to the results of the Turkey University Satisfaction Survey (TÜMA) 2025 conducted by the University Research Laboratory (ÜniAr), Kadir Has University performed strongly in student satisfaction. In the survey, in which more than 51 thousand students from 200 universities across Turkey participated, students evaluated universities under six main headings: learning experience, campus life, academic support, administrative functioning, resource richness and career support.

Top 5 in Istanbul and Top 13 in Turkey

According to the results of TÜMA 2025, our overall satisfaction score was announced as 491. With this score, we ranked in the top 5 among foundation universities in Istanbul and 13th in Turkey. Among foundation universities, we rose to 8th place. With this success, we are proud to be among the universities with “A” level satisfaction scores.

We Received Strong Feedback from Our Students

This success once again confirms our student-oriented approach, our understanding of quality in higher education and our vision of continuous development. In particular, our location in the center of Istanbul, our strong digital infrastructure, up-to-date course content and our student-friendly management approach were effective in increasing satisfaction rates.

Academic Quality and Social Life Stand Out

The qualified support offered to students by our academic staff, the investments made in our course content and our up-to-date education methods were directly reflected in the research results. At the same time, campus life, cultural activities and the effective use of digital systems were also positively evaluated by our students.

We Reinforce Our Strong Position in Satisfaction

TÜMA 2025 data once again confirmed Kadir Has University’s student-oriented approach and quality vision in higher education. With our strong performance in the field of education and campus life, we are happy to have an important place in student satisfaction among the foundation universities in Istanbul.
